message:
feat: add Vimium-style hint mode and split viewer module

Add hint mode (Ctrl+J) for keyboard-driven click navigation:
- Press Ctrl+J to show letter labels over viewport grid
- Type letters to click at that location
- Press Escape to cancel

Split viewer.zig into smaller modules:
- viewer/cdp_events.zig: CDP event handlers (navigation, targets, downloads)
- viewer/tabs.zig: Tab management (add, switch, picker)
- viewer/hints.zig: Hint grid generation and rendering

Reduces viewer.zig from 2151 to 1816 lines.
